seo.h1: Engineering Failure Diagnosis Calculator & Engineering Guide - AluCalc
seo.intro: Probabilistic framework for diagnosing mechanical failures based on multi-sensor input and symptom telemetry.

variables.P: Probability of root cause given symptoms

seo.step_by_step:
1. Define system parameters for Engineering Failure Diagnosis.
2. Consult the technical reference table for material constants.
3. Apply the ISO 17359 formula.
4. Run the post-calculation design checks.
seo.practical: In Manufacturing applications, accurate Engineering Failure Diagnosis analysis is vital for safety and performance.
